Medical Solutions for your Health

With over 40 years of experience in General Medicine and Homeopathy, my goal is to go beyond the symptom. Using advanced diagnosis with bio-frequencies, we do not limit ourselves to putting a label on your illness; instead, we look for its root cause to restore your body's natural balance.

We treat the "Human Being" as a whole, understanding that the place where a problem appears is rarely its true origin. Below, I present the treatment areas I address in my practice, from our main solutions to addressing a wide range of conditions.

Homeopathy

We treat the person, not the disease. Homeopathy is ideal for addressing chronic, recurrent conditions and emotional imbalances deeply and personally. In a detailed consultation, we investigate your history to find the right remedy your body needs to heal from within.

Stop Smoking Treatment

Break free from tobacco in a single session. Our method combines the latest bio-frequencies with comprehensive medical support to eliminate physical and psychological dependence. An advanced treatment with a 95% success rate that lets you regain your health and freedom.

Complete Detoxification

Clean your body of the modern toxic load. Our environment exposes us to harmful electro-magnetic frequencies (Geopathies: WiFi, cell phones, antennas, earthly emanations, etc.), heavy metals, chemicals, and toxins that affect our well-being. With bio-frequencies, we identify and neutralize these harmful substances, strengthening your immune system and recovering your energy and vitality.

Comprehensive Family Medicine

At Dr. Enrique Fernández's clinic, we specialize in Medicine for the entire family, holistically addressing digestive disorders, food intolerances, asthma, and allergies, especially in children. Our approach is unique as it considers and treats the entire family (parents and children), allowing us to understand the deep root cause of the illness from its context and family history.

MORE ADVANCED TREATMENTS

Restoring Physical and Environmental Balance
  • Allergies and Intolerances: Treating the cause of reactions to foods (wheat, lactose), pollens, mites, etc.
  • Geopathies and Electrosmog: Neutralizing the health effects of excessive artificial radiation (WiFi, antennas, etc.).
  • Chemical Toxicity: Elimination of pesticide residues, solvents, plastics, additives, and other substances.
  • Heavy Metals: Detection and specific treatment for the overload of mercury, lead, aluminum, etc.
Emotional and Mental Well-being
  • Anxiety, Stress, and Depression: Individualized support for managing anxiety, overcoming grief, or treating sadness from its source.
  • Fears and Phobias: Homeopathic treatment for specific or irrational fears.
  • Behavioral Problems: Addressing agitation, passivity, jealousy, or lack of concentration, both in adults and children.
  • Post-Traumatic Stress Syndrome: Support for recovering emotional balance.
  • Chronic Fatigue Syndrome: Dealing with post-viral or emotional exhaustion.
Chronic, Systemic, and Inflammatory Conditions
  • Respiratory and Skin Conditions: Asthma, recurrent colds, atopic dermatitis.
  • Digestive Problems: Treatment of intestinal dysbiosis and chronic disorders.
  • Chronic Fatigue Syndrome and Pain: Multifactorial approach to fatigue and systemic inflammation.
  • Support in Serious Diseases: Help to mitigate the side effects of chemotherapy and radiotherapy.
  • Immune and Metabolic System Imbalances: Support in autoimmune diseases and correction of acidosis.
  • Energy and Structural Blockages: Release of interferences caused by scars and treatment of Short Leg Syndrome.
  • Guillain-Barré Syndrome: Assistance in post-viral and infectious mononucleosis recovery.

MORA® NOVA TECHNOLOGY

In the context of MORA bio-resonance, wave cancellation illustrates how, by identifying the disharmonious electromagnetic frequencies of a body (those associated with an imbalance or disease) and generating an exactly opposite signal, these "negative" frequencies can be cancelled. This cancellation process seeks to "erase" pathological information and restore the body's natural energetic balance, thus facilitating its own self-healing mechanisms and allowing therapies to be more effective.

The Foundation: Medical Diagnosis

Remember that an effective treatment is only possible with a diagnosis that gets to the absolute bottom of the problem. General Medical Diagnosis using bio-frequencies is the tool that allows us to create a precise map of your health condition, identify the original root causes, and design a truly customized and highly effective treatment plan.

Important Note: Our list of treatments is only a general guide. If your specific condition does not appear here, please do not hesitate to contact me. The holistic approach and the sophisticated tools I use allow us to address a vast array of health imbalances.

Book appointment

Call us at +34 629 43 41 82

Monday to Friday, call to book an appointment, change an appointment (with 48 hours notice) or to request any type of information or consultation.

We are at your service!

“Before curing anyone, ask him if he is willing to give up the things that made him sick.”

— Hippocrates

“Health depends on being in harmony with our souls.”

— Edward Bach

“Medicine must integrate body, soul and spirit so that the treatment is true and lasting.”

— Rudolf Steiner

“The true doctor not only prescribes, but listens, understands and guides towards balance.”

— Anonymous

“Homeopathy does not treat diseases, but people who are sick.”

— André Saine

“The body whispers before it screams; the attentive doctor listens to the silence of the disease before it manifests.”

— Proposed Quote

“Technology heals, chemistry acts, but the soul is cured in the presence of love and listening.”

— Proposed Quote

“The physician's high and only mission is to restore the sick to health, to cure, as it is termed.”

— Samuel Hahnemann

“The good physician treats the disease; the great physician treats the patient who has the disease.”

— William Osler
